name: software-development-skills
description: Software-design knowledge from three books, distilled into skills and a design-review agent team for Claude Code.

plugins.name: software-development-skills
plugins.description: Five design skills (design-process, module-design, designing-for-change, design-review, inline-authoring) plus a principal-design-reviewer agent team, distilled from A Philosophy of Software Design, The Pragmatic Programmer, and The Design of Design.
